content.problemStatement:
A research lab is analyzing cellular samples arranged in an m×nm \times nm×n grid. A contamination event has occurred. The safety protocol dictates that if any cell in the grid is found to be contaminated (represented by a value of 000), its entire row and column must be neutralized by setting all their cells to 0.

Your task is to write a program that takes the initial state of the grid and returns the final state after the safety protocol is applied.


Input Format

The first line contains two space separated integers, MMM and NNN, representing the number of rows and columns in the matrix.
The next MMM lines each contain NNN space separated integers, representing the elements of the matrix.


Output Format

Print the modified matrix. Each row should be on a new line, with elements separated by a space.
